summary: Frontend testing complete for SDM Rewards new features: Password visibility toggle, Fintech design for auth pages, Dynamic admin URL security, OTP registration requirement, and Client profile page. All 9 features tested and working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working. Test mode OTP code: 123456. Dynamic admin URL format: /adminDDMMYY (e.g., /admin040326 for March 4, 2026).

Password_Visibility_Toggle_Client.details: Eye icon toggles password field between 'password' and 'text' types on login and registration forms

Password_Visibility_Toggle_Merchant.details: Eye icon toggles password field between 'password' and 'text' types on login and registration forms

Admin_URL_Security_404.details: /admin shows 404 Page Not Found as expected

Admin_URL_Dynamic_DDMMYY.details: /admin040326 (DDMMYY format) shows Admin Portal login form

Client_Auth_New_Design.details: New fintech premium design with AI-generated hero image, SDM logo, gradient backgrounds, and feature highlights

Merchant_Auth_New_Design.details: New fintech premium design with AI-generated business hero image, SDM logo, emerald/teal gradient theme

Client_OTP_Registration.details: Create Account button is disabled until OTP verification is complete. Get OTP button triggers SMS sending.

Merchant_OTP_Registration.details: Register Business button is disabled until OTP verification is complete. Get OTP button exists.

Client_Profile_Page.details: Profile page accessible at /client/profile after login. Includes Edit Profile tab, Withdrawals tab, and Save Changes button.

merchant_registration.png - Merchant registration with OTP requirement
